Creates a local builtin tool provider binding.

## Import

```ts
import { localBuiltinToolProviderBinding } from "@graphrefly/ts/executors/tool-provider-adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function localBuiltinToolProviderBinding(opts: LocalBuiltinToolProviderBindingOptions = {}): ToolProviderAdapterBinding<LocalBuiltinToolArguments, LocalBuiltinToolResult>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `LocalBuiltinToolProviderBindingOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The local builtin tool provider binding result.

## Example

```ts
import { localBuiltinToolProviderBinding } from "@graphrefly/ts/executors/tool-provider-adapters";
```
